case_title: SOSAIA HAVEA VS. OPEN DOOR LEGAL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF SOSAIA HAVEA IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT OPEN DOOR LEGAL IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY AMY SHERCIL. PLAINTIFF PREVIOUSLY DISMISSED A CIVIL ACTION WITH PREJUDICE BASED ON THE SAME ALLEGED FACTS. (SEE CGC-22-598975) NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CARRIE ZEPEDA; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
